evidence: Ceremony-entry identity establishment verified on merged main (c50de724). Gates: build / check / test exit 0; full suite 0 failures with the two formerly-skipped S4 migrate-path tests re-greened and zero remaining skips on that path. Runtime demonstrations: (1) tsx re-run of the original two-cell issue reproduction — the pre-identity cell now matches the control cell exactly (dry predicts migrated, live migrates, substrate_id persisted on disk, zero marker lines, items identity-stamped); (2) promoted operator CLI on a fresh pre-identity fixture — context-install reports substrateIdEstablished sub-90e0410f1c34df6f end-to-end, and the subsequent live update MIGRATES the 1.0.0->1.0.1 populated-block version bump (the operation the original issue substrate could never complete), registering the chain. Live active substrate: all 17 assets in-sync, no establishment field (already established), channels unchanged.
